commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR lacks contributor real-behavior proof and the handoff-copy retention/security semantics need maintainer approval.; Needs attention: The diff introduces an outbound media handoff copy path that can retain private media files outside OpenClaw's managed temp area.; Review finding: [P2] Clean up copied handoff media after send — extensions/imessage/src/send.ts:197-199 (sha=078bc07ad499ee4621c87b36f0fd8496e7933410)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the iMessage sender to resolve direct media targets to chat GUIDs, send media via `send-attachment`, split captions into a follow-up text send, add an outbound handoff directory env path, and extend send tests.

PR surface: Source +241, Tests +175. Total +416 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main only attempts `send-attachment` for media-only explicit chat sends, while direct handles and captioned media fall through to RPC `send` with `file`. I did not run a live iMessage bridge repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR lacks contributor real-behavior proof and the handoff-copy retention/security semantics need maintainer approval.

target.title: fix(imessage): route direct media captions through attachments
target.body:
## Summary
- route direct-handle iMessage media sends through chat resolution plus `send-attachment`
- split captioned iMessage media into attachment delivery followed by a normal text send
- keep explicit chat media-only attachment routing covered, and add regressions for direct media plus captions

Closes #87597

## Tests
- `node_modules/.bin/vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts --environment node --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`

No live iMessage media send was run.

Resubmitted from #87605 after GitHub would not allow reopening the closed PR.
target.author: turbotheturtle
